_comment: M-Pesa Daraja per-tenant credentials. Add these keys to each tenant's site_config.json (sites/<tenant>/site_config.json). The values below are Safaricom's PUBLIC sandbox credentials — anyone can run STK Push with simulated money against shortcode 174379. For production, replace ALL values with the tenant's real Daraja app credentials and set mpesa_env to 'production'.
_sandbox_test_phone: Use 254708374149 as PartyA for sandbox STK push — Safaricom's test phone that auto-completes
_production_checklist: 1. Get a Paybill or Till from Safaricom (visit a Safaricom branch with KRA PIN + biz cert)
2. Register a Daraja app at https://developer.safaricom.co.ke
3. Copy Consumer Key + Consumer Secret from the app dashboard into this file
4. Copy the Passkey (assigned per shortcode) into mpesa_passkey
5. Set mpesa_shortcode to your real paybill/till number
6. For B2C refunds: create an initiator user in the Safaricom portal, set initiator_name + initiator_password
8. Make mpesa_callback_base_url publicly reachable on HTTPS (Safaricom won't call HTTP or behind firewall)
9. Run MPesaClient.for_current_site().register_urls() to register the C2B callback URLs with Safaricom
